title: buildah inspect man page is inaccurate
body:
The 'buildah inspect' man page says the command can be use used like:

buildah inspect ctrid
buildah inspect imageid

However the second variant fails saying the provided argument is not a container.  In order to inspect an image you need to do "bulidah inspect --type=image <imageid>".  

The documentation needs to be touched up and/or the inspect command needs to try and inspect as an image if the container inspect fails and a type is not specified.
